problem.passage:
7. Read the conversation in <A> and the lesson plans in <B>, and
follow the directions.【4 points】
<A>
(Mr. Choi, a supervising teacher, is talking with his student
teacher, Ms. Han, about her lesson plan.)
SupT: Ms. Han, I checked your lesson plan and found a
couple of things that may help improve it.
: Oh, did I miss anything? ST
SupT: As you know, before you get to the main listening
stage, we want students to recognize the purpose of
listening, right?
ST : Yeah, and it sounds quite challenging. How can I do
that?
SupT: You can try activating schemata. Making connections
between personal experiences and learning can
facilitate students’ comprehension.
: Oh, I see. ST
SupT: And I recommend intensive listening. You know,
authentic conversations have a lot of contractions. So,
how about playing parts of a radio show focusing on
particular language features?
: Good idea. Thank you. Is there anything else I missed? ST
SupT: Hmm, why don’t you also try making some creative
activities? Students can sing a song or chant, or they
can record their own voice.
ST : Got it. I’ll try to find some that are exciting.
SupT: Great. That’s all I wanted to point out.
: Your suggestions are extremely helpful. I’ll make ST
some changes following your advice.
SupT: If you have any questions, don’t hesitate to ask.
: I really appreciate your advice. ST
Note: SupT = supervising teacher, ST = student teacher
영 어 [전공B]
<B>
After the conversation, Ms. Han revised her lesson plan
based on Mr. Choi’s suggestions. Below are the original and
modified lesson plans.
Original Lesson Plan
Stage Teaching & Learning Activities
Tshows the aim of the listening activity.
Tasks about what will happen to a person
Pre-listening
in a picture.
Tengages Ss in small talk.
Tasks Ss to listen to a story.
Tasks Ss to make inferences about the
While-listening
main topic of the story.
Tasks Ss to retell the story.
Tasks Ss to write a summary on the story.
Post-listening Tasks Ss to present on their summaries.
Tprovides comments on Ss’ presentations.
Modified Lesson Plan
Stage Teaching & Learning Activities
Tpresents the purpose of the listening
activity.
Tasks Ss to predict what will happen to Pre-listening
a person in a picture.
Tengages Ss in small talk.
Tasks Ss to listen to a story.
Tasks Ss to guess what the main topic of
While-listening
the story is.
Tasks Ss to do a gap-filling activity.
Tasks Ss to summarize the story.
Tasks Ss to act out assigned scenes from
Post-listening
the story.
Tprovides feedback on Ss’ performances.
Note: T = teacher, Ss = students
Identify the supervising teacher’s TWO suggestions from <A>
that are reflected in the modified lesson plan in <B>. Then,
explain your answers, respectively, with evidence from <B>.
6
(8면 중 면)
